sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52047" key="kairo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καιρόω</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καίρωμα</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καίρωσις</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καιρωστίς</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καιρο-τρίς</orth>, <sense id="n52047.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καῖρος</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
